name: @alzcare/edge
description: Supabase Edge Functions (Deno) — mqtt_bridge, position_estimator, rules_engine.

scripts.typecheck: deno install --allow-scripts && deno check functions/mqtt_bridge/index.ts functions/mqtt_bridge/longRunning.ts functions/position_estimator/index.ts functions/rules_engine/index.ts
scripts.build: echo "(edge functions are deployed via supabase CLI)" && exit 0
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:mqtt_bridge && npm run deploy:position_estimator && npm run deploy:rules_engine
